title: GENERAL LEGAL AID - 211info
text: OREGON LAW CENTER ONTARIO REGIONAL OFFICE GENERAL LEGAL AID Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides legal counseling and/or representation for low-income individuals who need assistance with routine legal matters (civil, non-criminal), usually regarding housing, public benefits, family, or elder law. Also provides legal assistance for survivors of domestic violence, including the obtainment of restraining orders. Some locations may offer additional services. 35 SE 5th Avenue Unit 1 Ontario, OR 97914 Eligibility: Low-income individuals who are at or below 125% of the Federal Poverty Level (FPL) Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-12:30pm and 1:30pm-5pm Email (541) 889-3121 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 889-3121 Toll-free (888) 250-9877 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, other languages by arrangement AREA SERVED: Baker, Grant, Harney, and Malheur Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 9am-12:30pm and 1:30pm-5pm Services: General Legal Aid Protective/Restraining Orders If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON LAW CENTER ONTARIO REGIONAL OFFICE
